---
title: "Puzzles"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Practice tracks for sharpening GPU programming, ML systems intuition,
algorithmic problem solving, and quantitative reasoning.
</p>

<div class="project-category-grid">
  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://leetgpu.com/#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">GPU Programming</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">LeetGPU</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      Browser-based GPU programming challenges for building comfort with kernels, memory movement, and parallel execution.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>GPU</span>
      <span>Kernels</span>
      <span>Practice</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://tensara.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">Tensor Systems</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">Tensara</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      Tensor and systems-oriented exercises for practicing the reasoning patterns behind modern AI workloads.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>Tensors</span>
      <span>Systems</span>
      <span>AI</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://puzzles.modular.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">Mojo / GPU</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">Mojo GPU Puzzles</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      Hands-on GPU puzzles in Mojo for learning kernel structure, memory hierarchy, and accelerator programming.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>Mojo</span>
      <span>GPU</span>
      <span>Kernels</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://gpudemystified.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">GPU Architecture</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">GPU Demystified</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      A practical path for building intuition about GPU architecture, programming models, and performance behavior.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>Architecture</span>
      <span>Performance</span>
      <span>CUDA</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://github.com/srush/GPU-Puzzles" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">CUDA Intuition</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">Sasha Rush GPU Puzzles</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      Interactive GPU puzzles by Sasha Rush for learning CUDA-style programming through small, focused exercises.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>Numba</span>
      <span>CUDA</span>
      <span>Colab</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://leetcode.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">Algorithms</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">LeetCode</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      Core algorithm and data-structure practice for interviews, implementation fluency, and problem decomposition.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>DSA</span>
      <span>Interviews</span>
      <span>Practice</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://projecteuler.net/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">Math + Code</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">Project Euler</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      Mathematical programming problems that reward clean reasoning, efficient algorithms, and numerical insight.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>Math</span>
      <span>Algorithms</span>
      <span>Reasoning</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://www.janestreet.com/puzzles/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">Quant Reasoning</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">Jane Street Puzzles</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      High-quality probability, logic, and optimization puzzles for practicing precise quantitative thinking.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>Logic</span>
      <span>Probability</span>
      <span>Optimization</span>
    </span>
  </a>

  <a class="project-category-card" href="https://brainstellar.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-card-kicker">Problem Solving</span>
    <span class="project-card-title">Brain Stellar</span>
    <span class="project-card-description">
      A puzzle archive for building broad reasoning strength across math, logic, and programming-style challenges.
    </span>
    <span class="project-card-tags">
      <span>Puzzles</span>
      <span>Logic</span>
      <span>Math</span>
    </span>
  </a>
</div>
